name: Maple Fluffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine maple syrup, brown sugar, water, and cream of tartar in a saucepan.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until it becomes brittle when a few drops are placed in cold water.
3. Add marshmallows to the mixture and stir until they have melted completely.
4. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, beat the egg white with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form.
6. Gradually pour the marshmallow mixture into the beaten egg white, continuing to beat until light and glossy.
7. Using a teaspoon, drop dollops of the mixture onto oiled or greased parchment paper.
8. Place a half cherry or nut in the center of each dollop.
9. Allow the fluffs to cool completely before serving.
